positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cosmic forest landscape viewed from a top-down perspective. The scene features glowing bioluminescent flora, meandering crystalline rivers, and floating islands connected by ethereal bridges. The main subjects are various stylized celestial creatures (like glowing foxes and winged hummingbirds) interacting with the highly detailed foliage. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and vaporwave aesthetics, using a rich, deep color palette of indigo, teal, violet, and electric gold. Use sharp, clean lines and strong, graphic silhouettes. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for seamless textile repeat printing, minimizing hard edges and maximizing visual flow. Cinematic lighting with glowing edge highlights on the flora. Minimalist yet maximalist composition.
negative: low detail, blurry, grain, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, extra limbs, poor anatomy, messy composition, gradient shift, photorealism, 3D render, monochrome
